agent_log.action: BUILD-METADATA FIX — strip '(PROSE REBUILD)' working-label suffix from built EPUB title; harden title source
agent_log.notes: Scoped build-metadata-only fix (no QA agent re-run, no prose/cover/listing change, no stage advance, no human-gate flip, no KDP/outward action). ROOT CAUSE: build-manuscript.sh set BOOK_TITLE by grepping BLUEPRINT.md H1, whose '(PROSE REBUILD)' working-label suffix leaked into the EPUB --metadata title. FIX: (1) removed '(PROSE REBUILD)' from the H1 of BLUEPRINT.md (build-critical), APPROVALS.md and STATUS.md (hygiene) — left dated FORMAT NOTE lines (FACTS.md) as historical record; (2) HARDENED build-manuscript.sh so BOOK_TITLE prefers pipeline-state.json canonical 'book_title', falling back to BLUEPRINT H1 then slug (minimal, backward-compatible — other books unaffected). REBUILT via bash build-manuscript.sh: EPUB 792K (>=500KB gate PASS), DOCX 68K, PDF 592K.
